mapper.insert:
SELECT 'M'||TRIM(TO_CHAR(SUBSTR(MAX(MMS_FORM_CD),2)+1,'00')) FROM MMS_FORM
INSERT INTO MMS_FORM(MMS_FORM_CD, MMS_FORM_CONT, MMS_FORM_TYPE) VALUES (#{mmsFormCd}, #{mmsFormCont}, '예약안내')
mapper.select: SELECT MMS_FORM_CD, MMS_FORM_CONT, MMS_FORM_TYPE FROM MMS_FORM ORDER BY MMS_FORM_CD ASC
